gameSubtitle:
Match gems and
clear the board!
howToPlayGoalDesc: Match 3 or more identical gems in a row or column to clear them and earn points.
howToPlayMatchDesc: Three identical gems lined up make a match! The gems inside the border are matched.
howToPlaySwapDesc: Swap adjacent gems by tap-tap or swipe. If no match is made, the gems swap back.
howToPlayComboDesc: When new gems fall and create chain matches, that's a combo! Higher combos earn more points.
howToPlaySpecialDesc: Matching 4 gems creates a line gem, and matching 5 creates a hyper gem. Large overlaps where row and column matches cross create a bomb. Line gems and bombs activate immediately when swapped with a normal adjacent gem. Hyper gems clear every gem of the swapped color. Swapping two special gems triggers an instant combo effect.
howToPlaySpecialRowDesc: Swap with a normal gem to clear one whole row immediately.
howToPlaySpecialColDesc: Swap with a normal gem to clear one whole column immediately.
howToPlaySpecialBombDesc: Swap with a normal gem to blast the surrounding 3x3 area immediately.
howToPlaySpecialHyperDesc: Swap it with a gem to clear every gem of that color.
howToPlaySpecialMakeRow: Match 4 identical gems to create a line gem.
howToPlaySpecialMakeHyper: Match 5 identical gems to create a hyper gem.
howToPlaySpecialMakeBomb: Create a bomb from a large overlap where row and column matches cross.
howToPlayHintDesc: Stuck? Tap the light bulb button to highlight a swappable pair.
